subcodes.first_line: The letter of 29 Dhi'l-Hijjah arrived. Praise be to God, it indicates the exaltation of the Cause of God and the attraction of hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ۲۹ ذی الحجه رسید الحمد لله دلالت بر ارتفاع امرالله و انجذاب قلوب
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @law of pilgrimage, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
